descFull: This is the public release of MIRA OS. Discrete memories decay through momentum loss, tools auto-configure when dropped into tools/ folder, and the system prompt composes from modular trinkets. I would like to think I've made an elegant brain-in-box. You load it and send cURL requests - it talks back, learns, and uses tools. Contributions welcome.
